variants: Zakari Boukari is dedicated to the field of aquatic ecology, where he has made a mark with his invention, the Ether Drift Sensor. Mentored by Nahla Sadek, he has developed a profound understanding of aquatic systems and their complexities. An active member of the Blue Harbor Anglers League, Zakari promotes sustainable fishing practices while conducting his research. His innovative projects have largely been funded by the Moonlace Fellowship Network, which supports groundbreaking work in this field. Through his efforts, Zakari aims to enhance the balance between human activities and environmental preservation.
